title: Transcriptional timing and noise of yeast cell cycle regulators-a single cell and single molecule approach.
author: Amoussouvi A Teufel L Reis M Seeger M Schlichting JK Schreiber G Herrmann A Klipp E
content: S-EPMC5962571 PMC5962571 Transcriptional timing and noise of yeast cell cycle regulators-a single cell and single molecule approach. Gene expression is a stochastic process and its appropriate regulation is critical for cell cycle progression. Cellular stress response necessitates expression
